info.title: ZBZ x402 API
info.description: Static discovery description for ZBZ x402 protected API probes.

get.description: Returns x402 payment requirements when no valid payment proof is supplied. After a valid payment, the runtime gateway can return protocol metadata.

200.description: Payment accepted or gateway metadata returned.

402.description: Payment required. Read the payment-required response header for x402 requirements.

payment-required.description: x402 payment requirements encoded by the runtime gateway.

500.description: Runtime gateway configuration or facilitator error.

get.description: Versioned alias for the x402 protected API probe.

200.description: Payment accepted or gateway metadata returned.

402.description: Payment required. Read the payment-required response header for x402 requirements.

payment-required.description: x402 payment requirements encoded by the runtime gateway.

500.description: Runtime gateway configuration or facilitator error.

x402.name: payment-signature
x402.description: x402 payment proof supplied after reading the HTTP 402 payment-required challenge.
